def positive_same_sequence_scanned_multiple_times_for_related_aggregates():
    rule_id = "same_sequence_scanned_multiple_times_for_related_aggregates"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that makes several full passes over the same data for related summaries."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
